- Added the required decisions log at [`.ddx/executions/20260506T101912-110d22c5/decisions.md`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c96fc86c-20260506T101912-110d22c5/.ddx/executions/20260506T101912-110d22c5/decisions.md) with one `WIRE` line for each of the 16 `internal/persona` symbols.
- Verified the tree is already clean:
  - `cd cli && go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./...`
  - `cd cli && go test ./...`
- Committed the evidence as `c84ab18d` with subject `docs: record persona reachability decisions [ddx-c96fc86c]`.

The current codebase already keeps `internal/persona` on the production reachability graph via `cli/internal/persona/reachability.go`, so no source edits were needed for this bead.
